_anthropic_comment: Optional — only needed for LLM-backed features (brand voice extraction, pipeline digest summaries, optional smarter signature parsing). Preferred: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in your shell env. Fallback: paste here if env propagation isn't working (common on macOS GUI apps). config.json is gitignored AND excluded from `make handoff` tarballs — keys never travel.
_signature_parser_comment: How contact enrichment parses email signatures. 'regex' (default) is free + fast. 'regex_then_llm' calls Claude to fill in title/organization when regex misses them (~$0.001 per missed sig). 'llm' always uses Claude on top of regex. Both LLM modes require anthropic_api_key.
_attachments_comment: Outbound: files larger than large_attachment_threshold_kb auto-upload to Drive and a share link is appended to the email body (avoids stdio buffer limits + corporate mail filters). gmail_max_message_kb is a safety pre-check against Gmail's 25MB per-message hard limit. Inbound: files larger than max_inline_download_kb auto-save to default_download_dir so the call never fails — change the dir to anything you want.
